data.title: Drift Protocol's $280 Million Exploit May Be Civil Negligence, Says Crypto Attorney
data.description: Crypto attorney Ariel Givner has suggested that the $280 million exploit of Drift Protocol could be considered civil negligence due to alleged lapses in basic security measures. According to NS3.AI, Givner pointed out that the team reportedly failed to maintain signing keys on separate air-gapped systems and did not exercise sufficient diligence when engaging developers met at industry conferences. Drift Protocol's update on Saturday revealed that the attackers had spent six months building trust before deploying malicious links and malware that compromised developer machines. The protocol expressed medium-high confidence that the same group was responsible for the Radiant Capital hack in October 2024.

data.title: Rwanda's Central Bank Warns Against FRW-Based Crypto Payments Amid New Regulations
data.description:
Rwanda's central bank has issued a warning against using the Rwandan Franc (FRW) for cryptocurrency payments and peer-to-peer trading following the listing of FRW on Bybit's platform. According to NS3.AI, this caution comes as a draft law proposes fines of up to 30 million FRW for unlicensed Virtual Asset Service Provider (VASP) operators. The Rwandan Cabinet approved the bill on March 4, 2026, and the Chamber of Deputies passed its general principles on March 31, with committee reviews still ongoing.

In addition to regulatory measures, the National Bank of Rwanda (BNR) is conducting a 12-month domestic pilot for its Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC), the e-FRW, after completing a proof-of-concept in February 2026. This initiative reflects Rwanda's cautious approach to integrating digital currencies within its financial system while ensuring regulatory compliance and consumer protection.

data.title: OpenAI Executives Disagree on IPO Timing
data.description: OpenAI's CEO and CFO are reportedly at odds over the timing of the company's initial public offering (IPO). According to Jin10, the disagreement highlights differing strategic visions within the company's leadership. The CEO is believed to favor a more cautious approach, while the CFO is pushing for a quicker move to the public markets. This internal debate comes as OpenAI continues to expand its influence in the AI industry, with its products gaining significant traction globally. The outcome of this disagreement could have substantial implications for OpenAI's future growth and market positioning.

data.title: Polymarket Removes Market on U.S. Airmen Rescue Amid Criticism
data.description: Polymarket has taken down a market related to the rescue of two U.S. airmen in Iran following criticism from lawmakers and other detractors. According to NS3.AI, a spokesperson from Polymarket stated that the listing did not align with the platform's integrity standards and was promptly removed after its appearance. This event highlights the increasing scrutiny on prediction markets, as congressional Democrats advocate for a ban on contracts associated with elections, warfare, and government activities.

data.title: Solana Foundation Introduces Agent Skills Toolkit for AI Agents
data.description: Solana Foundation has unveiled Agent Skills, an open-source toolkit designed to enhance AI agents on the Solana blockchain. According to NS3.AI, this toolkit includes over 60 modules contributed by the community, enabling developers to implement pre-built skills with a single line of code. These skills facilitate automated payments, trading, and various on-chain tasks. However, the Solana Foundation has cautioned that these community tools are not officially endorsed and highlighted potential security risks associated with unvetted DeFi integrations.

data.title: Strategy May Resume Bitcoin Purchases Amid Market Speculation
data.description: Strategy may resume its Bitcoin acquisition strategy this week following the revival of the "Orange Dot" tracker by Michael Saylor. According to NS3.AI, the company currently holds 762,099 BTC, valued at over $50 billion. Market analysts suggest that the issuance linked to STRC preferred stock might have replenished sufficient buying power to acquire at least 1,500 BTC.

data.title: Bitcoin and US Dollar-Pegged Stablecoins: A Symbiotic Relationship
data.description: Bitcoin Policy Institute research head Sam Lyman stated that Bitcoin and US dollar-pegged stablecoins have a mutually reinforcing relationship, as Bitcoin is predominantly traded against the dollar. According to NS3.AI, data from Hashrate Index reveals that Chinese mining pools continue to dominate over 36% of the global mining pool hashrate, despite China's comprehensive ban on mining activities.

data.title: Chatham County Police Investigate $76,500 Fraud Scheme
data.description: Chatham County police are currently investigating a fraud scheme in which a woman was deceived into losing $76,500. According to NS3.AI, the victim was instructed by scammers to withdraw cash from Truist Bank branches. She subsequently handed over the money to strangers after making three separate withdrawals. Authorities are working to identify the individuals involved in the scam.

data.title: Algorand's ALGO Token Surges 50% Following Quantum AI Paper Release
data.description: Algorand's ALGO token experienced a significant increase of approximately 50% over the past week, reaching $0.12. According to NS3.AI, this surge followed the release of a Google Quantum AI paper that highlighted Algorand's active implementation of post-quantum cryptography. The paper noted that larger and older networks like Bitcoin and Ethereum might encounter slower and more complex transitions to quantum-resistant infrastructure due to their inherent size, age, and design choices. Algorand has integrated Falcon digital signatures for smart transactions and state proofs, although its core consensus and built-in transactions continue to utilize Ed25519.

data.title: Drift Attributes April Exploit to North Korean Social Engineering Campaign
data.description:
Drift has linked its April 1 exploit, which resulted in the loss of approximately $280 million, to a six-month social engineering campaign allegedly conducted by North Korean actors. According to NS3.AI, the Solana-based perpetuals exchange revealed that the relationship with the suspected group began in the fall of 2025. Individuals posing as a quant trading firm approached Drift contributors at a major crypto conference during this period.

The group reportedly onboarded an Ecosystem Vault and deposited over $1 million of its own capital. Drift explained that the exploit was executed using durable nonces rather than exploiting a smart contract vulnerability. Meanwhile, Mandiant has not yet formally attributed the attack, as device forensics are still pending.

data.title: US media: Trump says he has been in "deep talks" with Iran, and was once close to holding direct talks.
data.description: According to Axios, US President Trump stated in a phone interview that the US is engaged in "deep negotiations" with Iran and hopes to reach an agreement before Tuesday's deadline. "The chances of a deal are very high, but if they don't, I'm going to destroy everything there," he said. When asked if he was worried about harming innocent civilians, Trump said he believed Iranians opposed to his government would support such strikes to weaken the regime. In the approximately eight-minute phone interview, Trump stated that his special envoys, Witkov and Kushner, were engaged in intensive negotiations with the Iranian side. Two sources involved in the negotiations said communication was being conducted both through intermediaries such as Pakistan, Egypt, and Turkey, and through text messages between Trump's advisors and Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi. "The negotiations are progressing well, but dealing with the Iranians is never a long way off," Trump said. He also stated that the two sides were close to reaching an agreement on direct negotiations a few days earlier. "But they said they'd meet again in five days. I asked, why five days? I felt they weren't serious enough. So I attacked that bridge," Trump said. (Jin Shi)

data.title: BNB Surpasses 590 USDT with a 0.04% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 05, 2026, 14:37 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 590 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 590.169983 USDT, with a narrowed 0.04% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: U.S. Job Growth Surpasses Expectations in March, Impacting Bitcoin and Treasury Yields
data.description:
The U.S. economy added 178,000 jobs in March, significantly exceeding the consensus estimate of 60,000. According to NS3.AI, this robust job growth contributed to a decrease in the unemployment rate, which fell to 4.3%. Following the release of these figures, Bitcoin was trading around $67,000.

The 10-year Treasury yield experienced an increase of four basis points, reaching 4.35%, while the dollar index rose slightly to 100.08. The Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) also reported softer internals in the household survey, noting a decline in the labor force by 396,000 and a participation rate of 61.9%.

data.title: AI TRENDS | AI Accelerates Crypto Attacks, Says Ledger CTO
data.description: Ledger CTO Charles Guillemet has highlighted the increasing role of artificial intelligence in facilitating crypto attacks, making them faster and more cost-effective. According to NS3.AI, over $1.4 billion in assets were stolen or lost in crypto attacks over the past year, as reported by DefiLlama. Guillemet noted that AI enhances the speed of vulnerability discovery and exploit chaining. He emphasized that formal verification and hardware-based security provide stronger protection for wallets and protocols.

data.title: Tesla's Q1 2026 Deliveries Miss Wall Street Expectations, Stock Drops 5.4%
data.description: Tesla reported first-quarter 2026 vehicle deliveries totaling 358,023 units, falling short of Wall Street's consensus estimate of approximately 365,645 vehicles. According to NS3.AI, this shortfall led to a 5.4% decline in Tesla's stock on Thursday. In response, Goldman Sachs adjusted its price target for Tesla from $405 to $375, while Truist also lowered its target. Both firms maintained their Hold ratings on the stock.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Anticipates Agreement with Iran by Monday
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed optimism about reaching an agreement with Iran by Monday. According to Foresight News, Trump stated that negotiations are currently underway with Iran. He mentioned that if an agreement is not reached promptly, he is considering taking drastic measures, including seizing control of oil resources. Trump believes that an agreement could be finalized as early as tomorrow.

data.title: Rumors of Trump's Hospitalization Debunked by White House
data.description:
On April 5, local time April 4, a rumor about U.S. President Donald Trump being hospitalized due to illness quickly spread across the U.S. internet. According to BlockBeats, White House Communications Director Steven Cheung refuted the claims, stating that President Trump was actively working at the White House and the Oval Office throughout the Easter weekend. Following a post on Trump's social media account about a rescued missing pilot, Cheung reiterated that journalists questioning the president's whereabouts should take note of his ongoing activities.

The White House also addressed the online speculation through its official account, criticizing those who concoct conspiracy theories when President Trump does not engage with the media for 12 hours, while noting the lack of similar scrutiny when Biden does not interact with the media for extended periods. The White House assured the public that President Trump has not ceased his duties and condemned the accounts spreading the hospitalization rumors as "complete idiots."

On April 4, President Trump's schedule was abruptly limited to "executive time," and the White House declared a media "lid," indicating no further public appearances for the day. Social media users interpreted the "lid," Trump's absence from public view, and the subsequent lack of public activities as potential evidence of him being treated at Walter Reed Hospital.

data.title: Bitcoin's Five-Year Performance Compared to Other Assets
data.description:
Peter Schiff recently commented on Bitcoin's performance over the past five years, noting that its price has increased by only 12%. According to Odaily, during the same period, the Nasdaq index rose by 57.4%, the S&P 500 index by 59.4%, gold by 163%, and silver by 181%. Schiff questioned the rationale for holding Bitcoin if its appeal lies in superior long-term performance.

Michael Saylor responded by emphasizing the importance of the time frame. He stated that since August 2020, Bitcoin has been the best-performing mainstream asset, with a clear advantage. Saylor suggested that extending the time span would only widen this gap.

data.title: An address deposited 10 million STO tokens into Bitget, and its peak unrealized profit reached $52.33 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, an address received 30.99 million STO tokens an hour ago, equivalent to approximately $5.98 million, and then deposited 10 million tokens, worth $1.92 million, into Bitget 45 minutes ago. Tracing the source of the funds, these tokens were accumulated by two addresses between October 2025 and January 2026 at an average price of $0.1713. This sale will yield a profit of $207,000. These 30.99 million tokens previously had a floating profit of $52.33 million when the price peaked at $1.86 on April 2nd.

data.title: Saylor responded to Peter Schiff: Bitcoin has been the best-performing mainstream asset since August 2020.
data.description: Peter Schiff wrote that Bitcoin's price has only risen 12% over the past five years. In contrast, the Nasdaq rose 57.4%, the S&P 500 rose 59.4%, gold rose 163%, and silver rose 181% during the same period. If Bitcoin's appeal lies in its superior long-term performance, then why should anyone continue to hold it? Michael Saylor responded, "The time frame is crucial. Since August 2020, Bitcoin has been the best-performing mainstream asset, and the advantage is very clear. If you extend the timeframe, this gap only widens."
